name: tala-project-tracker
description: Use Tala as a local project issue tracker for Codex work, including issue creation, updates, comments, images, and handoffs.

interface.shortDescription: Local issue creation, comments, and tracking for Codex agents.
interface.longDescription: Adds Tala workflow guidance and MCP tools for planning, issue creation, issue updates, comments, image uploads, progress notes, relationships, status changes, and handoff in a project-local tala.db.
defaultPrompt: Use Tala to create or reuse an issue for this work, then keep it updated.
Add a Tala progress comment and leave a handoff for the next agent.
